system.flavor: Some would say 'lucky shot'. To you, luck is a skill.
system.effect:
Effect 1
Attack: 1 damage. Hit: +1d3 damage
Effect [X]: Your foe takes 1 damage again after the attack (6+) 2d3 damage again.
Gambit [X]: (1-3) stun yourself and end your turn (4-5): Your foe takes 2 damage again (6+): Your foe takes 6 damage again.
